description_long: This dirt bike features a rugged, utilitarian design with a visibly weathered metallic frame and large, spoked wheels suited for off-road and urban environments. The engine is prominently exposed, with a cylindrical exhaust system mounted on the right side and a compact fuel tank above. The seat is a single, narrow, dark red cushion positioned for one rider, and the handlebars are straight with visible control levers and a headlight mounted at the front. The wheels have a distinctive radial spoke pattern, and the tires appear to be designed for mixed terrain. The bike's overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, with a focus on mechanical simplicity and ease of maintenance. The color palette is dominated by earthy browns, metallic grays, and hints of black, giving it a robust, industrial look.
description: A rugged, weathered dirt bike with large spoked wheels, exposed engine, and a single red seat, finished in earthy browns and metallic grays.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, exposed engine, high-mounted exhaust, and radial spoked wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the straight handlebars, headlight, and narrow tire profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the engine, exhaust, and seat, mirroring the first side but from the left.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the seat, rear wheel, and the end of the exhaust system.
